name: faasjs-mono
description: 🚀 FaasJS is a React-only, agent-friendly full-stack TypeScript framework for building predictable, type-safe applications with minimal dependencies.

scripts.pub: vp pack && vp run doc && node publish.ts
scripts.doc: node build-docs.ts && node sync-skill-references.ts && vp check --fix
scripts.clean: rimraf packages/*/node_modules packages/*/dist coverage packages/*/*.log tmp *.log
